General.Text: Divestiture and Dissolution, 2026, c. 3, ss. 553 to 561 (Freshwater Fish Marketing Corporation)

Regulations.Text: Regulations, 2026, c. 3, ss. 98 to 123, 127 (repealed), 170 (repealed), 175, 221, 373 and 374, 376 to 378, 446 to 452. 584 and 585

General.Text: Related provision, 2026, c. 3, ss. 124, 200 and 201, 382 to 385

Transitional.Text: Transitional Provisions, 2026, c. 3, ss. 128, 220, 358, 453 to 455, 495 and 496, 549 to 552, 562 to 564 and 575

CIF.Text: CIF, 2026, c. 3 in force on assent, except,

Item.Text: — ss. 3(3) and (4), 20(2) and (4) deemed in force 31.12.2023 see respectively ss. 3(8) and 20(6)
— ss. 9(1) and (4), 13(1) deemed in force 01.01.2020 see respectively ss. 9(5) and 13(2)
— s. 26(2) deemed in force 15.08.2025 see s. 26(4)
— ss. 42(1) and (2), 67(1), and 83(1) deemed in force 01.01.2026 see respectively ss. 42(3), 67(2) and 83(2)
— ss. 51(1), (2), (5) and (8), 85(1) to (3), 86(1) deemed in force 01.01.2022 see respectively ss. 51(9), 85(4) and 86(2)
— ss. 51(4), 57(3), 72(9) deemed in force 04.11.2025 see respectively ss. 51(11), 57(12) and 72(21)
— ss. 52(4), (9) and (13) deemed in force 21.11.2023 see s. 52(19)
— s. 52(5) deemed in force 17.11.2025 see s. 52(20)
— s. 53(3) deemed in force 28.11.2023 see s. 53(5)
— ss. 57(2), 72(8) deemed in force 16.12.2024 see respectively ss. 57(11) and 72(20)
— ss. 66(1) and (3) to (5), 68(1) to (6), 94(14) come into force 01.01.2027 see respectively ss. 66(8), 68(9) and 94(20) — Not in force
— s. 70(1) deemed in force 01.01.2018 see s. 70(2)
— ss. 72(2) and (13), 84(2) deemed in force 01.01.2023 see respectively ss. 72(16) and 84(4)
— ss. 72(8) deemed in force 16.12.2024 see s. 72(20)
— s. 96(1) deemed in force 09.08.2022 see s. 96(2)
— s. 98(1) comes into force 01.01.2027 see s. 98(2) — Not in force
— s. 125 in force 26.03.2026 (Coordinating amendments, deemed in force 01.01.2025 see respectively par. 125(d), (e) and (f))
— s. 126 deemed in force 20.06.2024 see respectively s. 126(2)
— s. 159(1) and (2) deemed in force 16.08.2025 see s. 159(3)
— s. 160(1) deemed in force 14.09.2023 see s. 160(2)
— s. 161(1) to (5) deemed in force 14.09.2023 see s. 161(6)
— s. 162(1) deemed in force 05.11.2025 see s. 162(2)
— s. 169 comes into force on 01.01.2035 see s. 169(2) — Not in force
— ss. 171, 172, 173 and 174(1) deemed in force 05.11.2025 see respectively ss. 171(2), 172(2), 173(2) and 174(3)
— ss. 174(2) comes into force 01.02.2028 see s. 174(4) — Not in force
— s. 191, enacting ss. 1 to 25 of the High-Speed Rail Network Act, in force on assent (26.03.2026)
— s. 192 comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the governor in Council see s. 194 — Not in force
— ss. 195 to 198 come into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council see s. 199 — Not in force
— s. 209 in force on assent (Coordinating Amendment — conditions met 26.03.2026 see s. 209(2))
— ss. 210 to 215 comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council see s. 216 — Not in force
— s. 220 in force on the 121st day after the day on which s. 217 comes into force see s. 222(2) (25.07.2026) — Not in force

— s. 224, enacting ss. 1 to 181 of the Consumer-Driven Banking Act, in force on assent 26.03.2026, except, ss. 10 to 12, 15 to 73, 75 to 112, 114(3), 115(b) to (u), 116, 120 to 122, 133 to 135, 140 to 142, 144 to 146, 150 to 168, 171 and 180 come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council see s. 181 of the Consumer-Driven Banking Act— Not in force

— ss. 345 to 347 and 350 come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council see s. 352 — Not in force

— s. 599, enacting ss. 1 to 8 of the National School Food Program Act in force on assent 26.03.2026
— s. 600, enacting ss. 1 to 96 of the Stablecoin Act, comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council see s. 97 — Not in force
